childhood.familyBackground: Born in Jiangsu Province. Family with textile and manufacturing background.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 장쑤성에서 태어남. 섬유 및 제조 배경이 있는 가족.
childhood.education: Technical and business education in China
childhood.earlyLife: Worked in silk manufacturing factory before taking over and transforming it.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 인수 및 전환하기 전에 견 제조 공장에서 근무.

careerTimeline.event: Worked in silk manufacturing factory in Jiangsu
Took over silk factory and transformed into Shenghong Group
careerTimeline.eventKo: 견 공장을 인수, Shenghong Group으로 전환

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into sand washing and diversified industrial operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 모래 세척 및 다양한 산업 운영으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Shenghong Group operates as major industrial conglomerate with multi-billion dollar revenue
careerTimeline.eventKo: Shenghong Group이 수십억 달러 매출의 주요 산업 재벌로 운영

failures.description: Shenghong Group faced debt accumulation exceeding 100 billion yuan
failures.descriptionKo: Shenghong Group이 1000억 위안 초과의 부채 누적 직면
failures.lesson: Monitor debt levels and capital structure to avoid financial stress
failures.lessonKo: 금융 스트레스를 피하기 위해 부채 수준 및 자본 구조 모니터링

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Shenghong Group into industrial conglomerate, diversified manufacturing portfolio
personalTraits.knownForKo: Shenghong Group을 산업 재벌로 구축, 다각화된 제조 포트폴리오
personalTraits.philanthropy: Philanthropic initiatives in education, healthcare, and poverty alleviation
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 교육, 의료, 빈곤 제거의 자선 활동
